label: Hourly: pick coding task → IDE run (git branch)
description: Every hour: pick the next open todo task (must have project_path), enqueue an ide_agent project_run with git branch + main as source. Replace placeholders before enabling.

job.title: Hourly coding task → IDE queue
job.instructions:
Call the tool tasks_pick_and_enqueue_ide_run exactly once with this JSON object (replace placeholders):
{
  "workspace_id": "<TODO_WORKSPACE_UUID>",
  "execution_user_id": "<ADMIN_USER_UUID>",
  "execution_profile": "coding_pipeline_git",
  "default_git_source_branch": "main",
  "default_git_branch_template": "agent/{{task.title}}-{{timestamp}}",
  "instructions_prefix": "Automated hourly pick: implement the task safely; keep changes small; run tests if present.",
  "require_pidea_enabled": true
}

Rules:
- Only call tasks_pick_and_enqueue_ide_run (no other tools).
- After the tool returns JSON, reply with one short line: picked true/false, run id if any, and error if any.
